name: The Postal Dude's 1-4
description:
All four of the postal dudes wrapped up into 1, All the way from crazy, to old chill guy. The Four live in a double wide together, with no error for the most part. Good luck with the four! P1=Senior P2=Patrick P3=Hunter P4=Rick

Also pfp is made by Лівий уел on Pinterest!
creator: Regan.Frantz
